title: Size Changing Devices
description: Adds a few devices that can change the height, width, and overall size of entities
body:
## Adds three Size-Changing Devices:
**Height Changer**- Changes the height of entities

**Width Changer**- Changes the width of entities

**Size Changer**- Changes the overall size of entities

### How To operate the devices:
Right-Click with one of the devices to open the size changer with yourself as the target

Punch an entity with one of the devices to open the size changer with it as the target


---------------------------------
If you want to see more mod projects like this, Check out my Twitch, where I make mods suggested by chat: [https://www.twitch.tv/modman337](https://www.twitch.tv/modman337)

You can also suggest things and report bugs on my discord: [https://discord.gg/MwjqnG3UqD](https://discord.gg/MwjqnG3UqD)
